title: trichocentrum candidum
intro: Trichocentrum candidum, also known as the yellow and white Oncidium, is a species of orchid that is native to Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Trichocentrum candidum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
